MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MILTON KATZ, ESQ., 415.441.5400, FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID BAIONI.
DANIEL REDMAN, ESQ., 415.693.0550, FOR DEFENDANT MONICA BAIONI.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MONIKA EICHNER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar because the Court never received courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DAVID BAIONI's Motion For Order Substituting Party is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
